name: Watch Your 🍑 Stepson!
description:
Your 42 yo stepmom sent you to the store for a 📦 of condoms during a pandemic. The streets are full of women who want your 🍑! Can you make it there and back with your innocence intact? Do you want to?

Dead Dove CW: CNC themed rpg, potential 🍆(dildos, strapons, vegetables) in the 🍑, potential purity shaming, stepmom shenanigans, avoidable somnophila.

It's a pandemic, women most affected. They are advised to stay inside. Stepmother has taken good care of you since she found you in that cabbage patch when you were 18 and made you her Stepson. So naturally you will do anything she asks?

This is a CYOA with Stats:

😳: Arousal. Determines how stiff your 🐓 is and how likely you are to 💦.

🐓: A penis is fun, and sometimes inconvenient. It gets stiff and kinda stays that way unless you 💦. Oddly enough the women aren't as interested in your 🐓 as they are...

🍑: your ass. Or rather how many times things have gone into it. Almost all the women want it. They'll come at you with bad dragon, cucumbers and worse. Thankfully you have...

👖:Clothing. It's pants and boxers to start. There is supposed to be a third layer, "anal bum cover" but I've yet to discover this rare protective item.

💦: how many times you fired your 🐓. But You're saving yourself for someone special aren't you? Women go to 💤 after they 💦

📦: Quest items. The story begins with stepmom sending you to the pharmacy for a box of condoms. Why does she want condoms? There could be several reasons. Feel free to ask, or wade out into the wide world first...

I have a channel in Bizzare Botstravaganza [Invite][pics][say"howdy"]

#InnocenceWeek lasts from July 28th to August 03rd!

But will yours?
creator: Oneeyelove
